prompt: Click the Submit button in the open Notepad window
Read the current value of the order total field on the SAP screen that's open
Take a screenshot of the dialog that just popped up
Walk through the running Salesforce app and tell me what tabs are available in the navbar
Fill out the new customer form in the running CRM with name Acme Corp, email contact@acme.com, and click Save
Extract the table from the invoice list view in the open browser tab
Verify that the success toast actually appears after I click Save in the app
Inspect the UI tree of the currently focused window so I can see what selectors are available
Drive the running Calculator app to compute 23 * 47 and read the result
Type my email into the login field and click Sign In on the open page
Capture the values shown in the customer details panel right now
Open the File menu in Excel and click Save As
Probe the running app and list all the buttons visible on the current screen
Click the third row in the orders grid and read what's in the detail pane
Navigate to the Settings menu in the open application and toggle dark mode on
Verify the UI shows status = Approved after the workflow finished
Use uia to click Continue, wait for the next screen, then screenshot it
Read the error message text from the dialog that just appeared
Drive Outlook to compose a new email to bob@example.com with subject 'Status update'
Inspect the running browser tab and find the search input element
Pull all rows out of the data grid showing in the running ERP screen
Click into the Description textarea and type the order notes I just dictated
Verify the checkbox is checked and the Submit button is enabled before I run the rest
Walk me through the live app step by step: capture each screen and tell me what controls are there
Click the Refresh icon in the ServiceNow tab that's open and read the new ticket count
Screenshot the entire desktop and then zoom into the warning banner
Fill out the multi-step wizard with these values and screenshot each page after I confirm
Read whatever's in the clipboard preview field and tell me
Use uip rpa uia to discover the running applications and list them
Open the running SAP Logon, double-click the Production system, and log in with my credentials from the password manager
Click through the cookie banner and the survey popup so the page is usable
Inspect the UI of the running app and tell me which fields are required
Drive the live app to filter the orders table by status=Pending and tell me how many rows are returned
Read the value of the 'Total Due' label in the open invoice
Click the hamburger menu, then Reports, then Monthly Summary, and screenshot the chart
Verify the modal closed and the underlying form is back to enabled
Check the running browser to confirm the file actually uploaded — I see a spinner but want to be sure
Type 'Hello world' in the chat input and send it
Capture the table of test results from the running test runner UI
Click into each tab on the form and screenshot it so we have a record
Read the current selection in the dropdown for Country in the open form
Drive the running app to add three line items: pencil x10, paper x5, stapler x2 — then screenshot the cart
Inspect the calendar widget in the live app and pick May 15 2026
Click the export button and verify a CSV download started
Read every visible label and value on the customer profile page open in Chrome
Walk through the wizard and confirm each step shows a green checkmark before moving on
Take a screenshot of the running app right now so I can attach it to a bug report
Drive the open browser to navigate to the Reports page, expand the date filter, and set last 30 days
Probe the UI tree under the Orders grid and show me the cell references for the Customer column
Click OK on the confirmation dialog, wait for the next screen to load, and tell me what's there
